_agent.canonical_source: This manifest is the single source of truth for spec/plan lifecycle. Do not infer backlog from markdown Status lines, unchecked workflow-gate checkboxes, or cross-spec deferral prose.
_agent.before_brownfield_scan: Call omg_workflow_manifest_list with active_only=true before globbing or reading .omg/specs/ or .omg/plans/. Only entries returned there are active backlog.
_agent.on_spec_crystallized: Add or update spec entry: status=draft until user approves, then approved.
_agent.on_plan_consensus: Add plan entry linked via spec_id; set plan status=planned and spec status=planned if not yet executing.
_agent.on_execution_start: Set linked spec/plan entries to executing.
_agent.on_execution_complete: Set status=complete with evidence (tests/commands/paths). Ignore deferrals to entries already complete.
_agent.markdown_checkboxes: Unchecked boxes under 'Interview Complete', 'Workflow Gates', or 'Critic Checklist' are historical gate records, not agent todos, unless the manifest entry is active.
